title.text: Assigning input and ideas to your colleagues

description.text: Collaborate with colleagues on inputs inside a project and on proposals

body:0002.text: Assigning input and ideas to colleagues allows you to distribute work across your team so that every idea, comment, or proposal gets timely follow‑up.

body:0004.text: Increases internal efficiency by making clear who is responsible for each item.

body:0005.text: Ensures participants see their input processed quickly, which improves trust and encourages them to return.

body:0007.text: Ideas (via the Input Manager in each project)

body:0008.text: Proposals (via the Proposals overview in the back‑end)

body:0009.text: How to assign inputs to colleagues?

body:0011.text: By default, every new idea is assigned to:

body:0012.text: The first project manager created for that project.

body:0013.text: If there’s no project manager, the first platform administrator.

body:0015.text: Go to General Tab of your project page → Access Rights tab.

body:0016.text: Select a PM or admins in the section Who is responsible for processing the posts?

body:0017.text: You can update this at any time.

body:0019.text: Open the Input Manager for the project.

body:0020.text: Reassign any idea to a specific colleague.

body:0021.text: The new assignee receives an email notification and a platform notification immediately.

body:0022.text: How to follow up on assigned inputs?

body:0024.text: Use the dropdown filter to see only the ideas assigned to you.

body:0025.text: Switch the toggle to show inputs that still need feedback.

body:0026.text: Use the dropdown to view another colleague’s assignments if needed.

body:0028.text: Admins and project managers receive a weekly email listing all their assigned inputs that still require feedback.

body:0029.text: An input remains in this list until feedback has been given.

body:0031.text: Project managers/admins can leave internal comments on ideas

body:0032.text: Internal comments are visible only to staff, not to participants

body:0033.text: Find this by: Project → Ideation/Proposal phase → Click an idea → Internal Comments
